summary: Regression test post-refactor (useDashboardData hook, DayCard split, CalendarHeatmap useMemo, use-toast deps). Both backend and frontend smoke + key flows verified end-to-end. All checks pass.
passed: Dashboard renders 'Stride' header, 4 stats cards (stat-current-streak, stat-best-streak, stat-this-week, stat-total)
Today's checklist renders 5 exercise checkboxes with today-progress indicator
Clicking checkbox increments progress (4/5 -> 5/5) and persists across reload (POST /api/sessions/toggle integration OK)
WeeklyPlan renders all 7 edit-day-{day} buttons (mon-sun); clicking opens EditPlanDialog with prefilled title 'Chest & Triceps'
Settings: open-settings-btn opens dialog, email + reminder switch saved, toast 'Settings saved' appears
Calendar heatmap renders 84 cells; hovering shows heatmap-hover-info ('2026-04-16 · No workout logged')
No React duplicate-key warnings or console errors detected on Dashboard
notes: Refactor is behavior-preserving. Resend email integration is MOCKED via empty RESEND_API_KEY as intended; /api/reminder/send-now correctly returns disabled_or_missing_config.
